preamble: The palatalization of the velar nasal [ŋ] into a palatal nasal [ɲ] typically occurs when followed by front vowels or palatal glides.

examples.note: Japanese moraic nasal 'n' is realized as a palatal nasal [ɲ] before palatal sounds.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
